mapper.sql: SELECT tb.* FROM tbl_stock_adjust_sheet AS tb

SELECT tb.id, tb.code, tb.sc_id, tb.biz_type, tb.reason_id, tb.status, tb.description, tb.create_by, tb.create_time, tb.update_by, tb.update_time, tb.approve_by, tb.approve_time, tb.refuse_reason, d.id AS detail_id, d.product_id AS detail_product_id, d.sku_id AS detail_sku_id, s.code AS detail_sku_code, s.sale_property_text AS detail_sale_property_text, p.code AS detail_product_code, p.name AS detail_product_name, c.name AS detail_category_name, b.name AS detail_brand_name, p.spec AS detail_spec, p.unit AS detail_unit, d.stock_num AS detail_stock_num, ps.stock_num AS detail_cur_stock_num, d.description AS detail_description FROM tbl_stock_adjust_sheet AS tb LEFT JOIN tbl_stock_adjust_sheet_detail AS d ON d.sheet_id = tb.id LEFT JOIN base_data_product AS p ON p.id = d.product_id LEFT JOIN base_data_product_sku AS s ON s.id = d.sku_id LEFT JOIN base_data_product_category AS c ON c.id = p.category_id LEFT JOIN base_data_product_brand AS b ON b.id = p.brand_id LEFT JOIN tbl_product_stock AS ps ON ps.sku_id = d.sku_id AND ps.sc_id = tb.sc_id

SELECT s.id, s.id AS sku_id, g.id AS product_id, s.code AS sku_code, s.sale_property_text, g.code, g.name, c.id AS category_id, c.name AS category_name, b.id AS brand_id, b.name AS brand_name, g.spec, g.unit, ps.stock_num AS cur_stock_num FROM base_data_product AS g INNER JOIN base_data_product_sku AS s ON s.product_id = g.id LEFT JOIN base_data_product_category AS c ON c.id = g.category_id LEFT JOIN base_data_product_brand AS b ON b.id = g.brand_id LEFT JOIN tbl_product_stock AS ps ON ps.sku_id = s.id AND ps.sc_id = #{scId} LEFT JOIN recursion_mapping AS rm ON rm.node_id = c.id and rm.node_type = 2
mapper.select:
AND ( g.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{condition}, '%') OR g.code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{condition}, '%') OR s.id IN (SELECT sc.sku_id FROM base_data_product_sku_code sc WHERE sc.code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{condition}, '%')) ) AND g.product_type = 1 AND g.available = TRUE AND s.available = TRUE
ORDER BY g.code

AND ( g.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{vo.condition}, '%') OR g.code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{vo.condition}, '%') OR s.id IN (SELECT sc.sku_id FROM base_data_product_sku_code sc WHERE sc.code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{vo.condition}, '%')) )
AND b.id = #{vo.brandId}
AND (c.id = #{vo.categoryId} OR FIND_IN_SET(#{vo.categoryId}, rm.path))
AND g.product_type = 1 AND g.available = TRUE AND s.available = TRUE
ORDER BY g.code
